subject: Sociology
title: Liberation Theology
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Liberation Theology.

hook.text: In 1960s Latin America, Catholic priests told the poor that God wanted them to fight back.

buildup.text: Liberation theology fused Christianity with social justice, arguing faith demands action against poverty.

discovery.text: Priests organized communities, challenged dictators, and reread scripture as a call for the oppressed.

twist.text: The Vatican condemned it as Marxism in disguise. Some liberation theologians were silenced or expelled.

climax.text: Liberation theology proved Marx wrong: religion doesn't always sedate. Sometimes it radicalizes.
